code: import React,{useState}from'react';import'./SafeWordModal.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const SafeWordModal=_ref=>{let{isOpen,onClose,onSave}=_ref;const[safeWord,setSafeWord]=useState('');if(!isOpen)return null;const handleSave=()=>{if(safeWord.trim()){localStorage.setItem('sahayak_safe_word',safeWord.trim().toLowerCase());onSave(safeWord.trim().toLowerCase());onClose();}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"modal-overlay",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"glass-panel modal-content",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h2",{className:"modal-title",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"icon",children:"\uD83D\uDD12"})," Set Your Safe Word"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"modal-description",children:"If you type this word anytime, screen instantly switches to a fake notes app."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",className:"modal-input",placeholder:"e.g. \"notes\" or \"history\"",value:safeWord,onChange:e=>setSafeWord(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"modal-actions",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn-secondary",onClick:onClose,children:"Cancel"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn-primary",onClick:handleSave,children:"Save Word"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"modal-footer",children:"Saved to localStorage"})]})});};export default SafeWordModal;
